<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">TranslatedChunk</span><span class="p">]:</span>

        <span class="n">finding</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">finding</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">effective</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">findings</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">finding</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">severity</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ERROR</span>

<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_required_review_errors</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">effective</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">EffectiveTranslations</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Coverage findings that fail ``build --require-reviewed``.</span>

<span class="sd">    Treats every missing/stale/blocked review gap as an ERROR regardless of the</span>
<span class="sd">    pass ``enforce`` setting, because ``--require-reviewed`` is an explicit</span>
<span class="sd">    release gate. Active-review staleness is already reported as an ERROR by</span>
<span class="sd">    validation and surfaces through ``effective.findings``.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">cfg</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">profile_config</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">cfg</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">cfg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">quality_review</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">cfg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">quality_review</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">enabled</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="n">quality_cfg</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">cfg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">quality_review</span>
    <span class="k">try</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">store</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">load_translation_store</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">except</span> <span class="ne">Exception</span><span class="p">:</span>  <span class="c1"># noqa: BLE001 - store problems are reported by validation</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="n">errors</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">stored</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">store</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">items</span><span class="p">():</span>
        <span class="n">chunk_id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">stored</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="si">:</span><span class="s2">04d</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
        <span class="n">errors</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extend</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">review_coverage_findings</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">stored</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">quality_cfg</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">force_error</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">errors</span>

<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">records_to_span_text</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">span</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">ProseSpan</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">targets</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">])</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>

<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_build_target_stream</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">chunks</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Chunk</span><span class="p">],</span>
    <span class="n">translated</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">TranslatedChunk</span><span class="p">],</span>
    <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">require_complete</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]:</span>
    <span class="n">target_stream</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="n">missing_records</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
    <span class="n">missing_words</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">chunk</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">chunks</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">translated_chunk</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">translated</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">chunk</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">translated_chunk</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">require_complete</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">missing_records</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">chunk</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="n">missing_words</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="nb">sum</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="n">count_words</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">record</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">chunk</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">target_stream</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extend</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">record</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">chunk</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>
        <span class="n">by_id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">record</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">record</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">translated_chunk</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records</span><span class="p">}</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">record</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">chunk</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">translated_record</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">by_id</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">translated_record</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">require_complete</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">missing_records</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
                <span class="n">missing_words</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="n">count_words</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">target_stream</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">translated_record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">translated_record</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">require_complete</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">missing_records</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">BuildError</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;build requires complete translations: &quot;</span>
            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">missing_records</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> record(s), </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">missing_words</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> source word(s) remaining&quot;</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">target_stream</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">target_stream</span>

<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_build_markdown</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">require_complete</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">require_reviewed</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">BuildResult</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="n">source</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">find_source_file</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.config</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">current_source_sha256</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">extracted_source_sha256</span>

    <span class="n">extracted</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">extracted_source_sha256</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">extracted</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">extracted</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">current_source_sha256</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">BuildError</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;source file has changed since last extraction; &quot;</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;run &#39;booktx extract&#39; to update chunks before building&quot;</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">source</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">read_text</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;utf-8&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">names</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_load_names</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">extraction</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">extract_markdown</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">protected_terms</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">names</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">spans</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">extraction</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">spans</span>
    <span class="n">span_texts</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">*</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">spans</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">chunks</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_load_chunks</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">translated</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_load_translated</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">require_reviewed</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">require_reviewed</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.chunking</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">segment_spans</span>

    <span class="n">seg_counts</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span>
        <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">segment_spans</span><span class="p">([</span><span class="n">span</span><span class="p">],</span> <span class="n">language</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_language</span><span class="p">))</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">span</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">spans</span>
    <span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="n">target_stream</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_build_target_stream</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">chunks</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">translated</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">require_complete</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">require_complete</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">pos</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">idx</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">span</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">enumerate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">spans</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="n">count</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">seg_counts</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">idx</span><span class="p">]</span>
        <span class="n">chunk_targets</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">target_stream</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">pos</span> <span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">pos</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">count</span><span class="p">]</span>
        <span class="n">pos</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="n">count</span>
        <span class="n">span_texts</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">idx</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">records_to_span_text</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">span</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">chunk_targets</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">replacements</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="n">text</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">text</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">span_texts</span><span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="n">output</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">build_markdown</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">extraction</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">template</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">replacements</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">out_path</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_output_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">source</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">suffix</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;.md&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.io_utils</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">write_text_atomic</span>

    <span class="n">write_text_atomic</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">out_path</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">output</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">BuildResult</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">output_path</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">out_path</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">format</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;markdown&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">span_count</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">spans</span><span class="p">))</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_format_inline_xhtml_build_error</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">span</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Any</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">message</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Format an EPUB inline-XHTML build error with chapter/record location.</span>

<span class="sd">    Build is a fallback for what validate/check should catch first; the message</span>
<span class="sd">    points the user at the scoped check command.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.command_hints</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">check_command</span>

    <span class="n">parts</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="n">message</span><span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="n">location</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="nb">getattr</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">span</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;chapter_id&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="n">location</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;chapter </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">span</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="nb">getattr</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">span</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;chapter_title&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="n">location</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">span</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_title</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">records</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">getattr</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">span</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;records&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[])</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">records</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">location</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;record </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">records</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">span_ref</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">getattr</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">span</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;span_ref&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">span_ref</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="nb">getattr</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">span_ref</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;block_id&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="n">location</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;block </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">span_ref</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">block_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="nb">getattr</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">span_ref</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;document_href&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="n">location</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;href </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">span_ref</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">document_href</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">location</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">parts</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;at &quot;</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="s2">&quot;, &quot;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">join</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">location</span><span class="p">))</span>
    <span class="n">parts</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Run: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">check_command</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">span</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="s2">&quot; &quot;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">join</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">parts</span><span class="p">)</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_build_epub</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">require_complete</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">require_reviewed</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">BuildResult</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">text2epub</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="p">(</span>  <span class="c1"># type: ignore[import-not-found]</span>
        <span class="n">Replacement</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">ReplacementPlan</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">rebuild_epub</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">text2epub.errors</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="p">(</span>  <span class="c1"># type: ignore[import-not-found]</span>
        <span class="n">PackageError</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">ReplacementError</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">ValidationError</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">text2epub.validation</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="p">(</span>  <span class="c1"># type: ignore[import-not-found]</span>
        <span class="n">scan_epub_for_unresolved_tokens</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.epub_output_policy</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">PolicyError</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">audit_epub_output_policy</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">reconcile_css_injection</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">resolve_epub_output_policy</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">to_text2epub_output_rewrite</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">source</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">find_source_file</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">manifest</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">load_manifest</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">manifest</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">BuildError</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;EPUB extraction manifest is missing. Run `booktx extract` first.&quot;</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">try</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">epub_template</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">load_epub_template_from_manifest</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">manifest</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">assert_source_sha</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">manifest</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">sha256</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">assert_source_sha</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">source</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">epub_template</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text2epub_manifest</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;source_sha256&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">)),</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">except</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span> <span class="k">as</span> <span class="n">exc</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">BuildError</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">exc</span><span class="p">))</span> <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">exc</span>

    <span class="n">translated</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_load_translated</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">require_reviewed</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">require_reviewed</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.epub_preflight</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">assemble_epub_replacements</span>

    <span class="n">assembled_spans</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">assemble_epub_replacements</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">project</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">source_chunks</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="n">chunk</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">chunk</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">chunk</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">_load_chunks</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)},</span>
        <span class="n">effective_chunks</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">translated</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">require_complete</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">require_complete</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">replacements</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Replacement</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">span</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">assembled_spans</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">span_ref</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">span</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">span_ref</span>
        <span class="n">errors</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="n">issue</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">issue</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">span</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">sanitized_issues</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">issue</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">severity</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;error&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">errors</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">BuildError</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">_format_inline_xhtml_build_error</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">span</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">errors</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">message</span><span class="p">))</span>
        <span class="n">replacements</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">Replacement</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">block_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">span_ref</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">block_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">text</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">span</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">replacement_text</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">expected_source</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">span_ref</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_text</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">allow_inline_xhtml</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">span</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">allow_inline_xhtml</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="c1"># Resolve booktx output policy and map it to text2epub output rewrite.</span>
    <span class="k">try</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">policy</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">resolve_epub_output_policy</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">except</span> <span class="n">PolicyError</span> <span class="k">as</span> <span class="n">exc</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">BuildError</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">exc</span><span class="p">))</span> <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">exc</span>
    <span class="n">output_rewrite</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">to_text2epub_output_rewrite</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">policy</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">out_path</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_output_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">source</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">suffix</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;.epub&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">out_path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">parent</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">mkdir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">parents</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">exist_ok</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="c1"># Build into a sibling temporary path so audits complete before the last</span>
    <span class="c1"># good final output is replaced.</span>
    <span class="n">tmp_path</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">out_path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">with_suffix</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">out_path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">suffix</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="s2">&quot;.tmp&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">upstream_report</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="k">try</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">try</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">upstream_report</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">rebuild_epub</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">ReplacementPlan</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="n">source_epub</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">source</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">extraction_manifest</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">epub_template</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text2epub_manifest</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">replacements</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">replacements</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">output_rewrite</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">output_rewrite</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="p">),</span>
                <span class="n">tmp_path</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">except</span> <span class="n">ValidationError</span> <span class="k">as</span> <span class="n">exc</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">match</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">search</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">r</span><span class="s2">&quot;token &#39;([^&#39;]+)&#39;.*entry &#39;([^&#39;]+)&#39;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">exc</span><span class="p">))</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">match</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">token</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">entry_name</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">match</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">groups</span><span class="p">()</span>
                <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">BuildError</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;built EPUB contains unresolved placeholder &quot;</span>
                    <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">token</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> in </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">entry_name</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
                <span class="p">)</span> <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">exc</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">BuildError</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">exc</span><span class="p">))</span> <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">exc</span>
        <span class="k">except</span> <span class="n">ReplacementError</span> <span class="k">as</span> <span class="n">exc</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">BuildError</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">exc</span><span class="p">))</span> <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">exc</span>
        <span class="k">except</span> <span class="n">PackageError</span> <span class="k">as</span> <span class="n">exc</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">BuildError</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">exc</span><span class="p">))</span> <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">exc</span>

        <span class="n">findings</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">scan_epub_for_unresolved_tokens</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">tmp_path</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">findings</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">entry_name</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">token</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">findings</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">BuildError</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;built EPUB contains unresolved placeholder </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">token</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> in </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">entry_name</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="c1"># Post-build policy audit and reconciliation with the upstream report.</span>
        <span class="n">extraction_hrefs</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">epub_template</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text2epub_manifest</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;documents&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">{})</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">keys</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">try</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">audit</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">audit_epub_output_policy</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">tmp_path</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">extraction_hrefs</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">extraction_hrefs</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">policy</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">policy</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">output_rewrite</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
                <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">upstream_report</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
                <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="nb">getattr</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">upstream_report</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;output_rewrite&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
            <span class="p">):</span>
                <span class="n">upstream_css</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">upstream_report</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">output_rewrite</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">css_injected_entries</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="n">reconcile_css_injection</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">tmp_path</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">upstream_css_entries</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">upstream_css</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">except</span> <span class="n">PolicyError</span> <span class="k">as</span> <span class="n">exc</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">BuildError</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">exc</span><span class="p">))</span> <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">exc</span>

        <span class="c1"># All checks passed: atomically replace the final output.</span>
        <span class="n">tmp_path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">replace</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">out_path</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">finally</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">tmp_path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">exists</span><span class="p">():</span>
            <span class="n">tmp_path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">unlink</span><span class="p">()</span>

    <span class="n">upstream</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">upstream_report</span>
    <span class="n">report</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">object</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;changed_entries&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">upstream</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">changed_entries</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">upstream</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="p">[],</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;replacement_count&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">upstream</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">replacement_count</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">upstream</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;unresolved_token_count&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">upstream</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">unresolved_token_count</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">upstream</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">),</span>
    <span class="p">}</span>
    <span class="n">report</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;epub_output_policy&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_policy_report_dict</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">policy</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">audit</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">upstream_report</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">BuildResult</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">output_path</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">out_path</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="nb">format</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;epub&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">span_count</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">epub_template</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">spans</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">report</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">report</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_policy_report_dict</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">policy</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">audit</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">upstream_report</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">object</span><span class="p">]:</span>  <span class="c1"># type: ignore[no-untyped-def]  # Phase 0 baseline: internal helper, param types span text2epub/booktx boundary objects; see docs/mypy-baseline.md</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Serialize the resolved policy detail for the build report.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">serialized_text2epub</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">object</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">upstream_report</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
        <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="nb">getattr</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">upstream_report</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;output_rewrite&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="n">ow</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">upstream_report</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">output_rewrite</span>
        <span class="n">serialized_text2epub</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;applied&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">ow</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">applied</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;opf_path&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">ow</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">opf_path</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;changed_entries&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">ow</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">changed_entries</span><span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;targeted_content_entries&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">ow</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">targeted_content_entries</span><span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;language_patched_entries&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">ow</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">language_patched_entries</span><span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;css_injected_entries&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">ow</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">css_injected_entries</span><span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;fixed_layout_skipped_entries&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">ow</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">fixed_layout_skipped_entries</span><span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;old_primary_language&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">ow</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">old_primary_language</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;new_primary_language&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">ow</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">new_primary_language</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;warnings&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">ow</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">warnings</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="p">}</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">{</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;applied&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">audit</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">applied</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;language_policy&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">policy</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">language_policy</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;language&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">policy</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">language</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;hyphenation&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">policy</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">hyphenation</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;changed_entries&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">audit</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">changed_entries</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;targeted_xhtml_entries&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">audit</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">targeted_xhtml_entries</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;css_injected_entries&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">audit</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">css_injected_entries</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;fixed_layout_skipped_entries&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">audit</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">fixed_layout_skipped_entries</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;warnings&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">audit</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">warnings</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;text2epub&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">serialized_text2epub</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">}</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_load_names</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]:</span>
    <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.config</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">load_names</span>

    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">load_names</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">protected_terms</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_output_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">source</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">suffix</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">output_filename</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">output_dir</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">BuildError</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;Output directory is not configured.&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">output_dir</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">output_filename</span>
    <span class="n">stem</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">source</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">stem</span>
    <span class="n">target</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target_language</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">output_dir</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">BuildError</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;Output directory is not configured.&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">output_dir</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">stem</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">.</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">target</span><span class="si">}{</span><span class="n">suffix</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>

<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.build.BuildResult">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">BuildResult</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Outcome of a build run.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.build.BuildResult.__init__">[docs]</a>
    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="fm">__init__</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">output_path</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="nb">format</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>

        <span class="n">report</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">object</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">output_path</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">output_path</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">format</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">format</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">span_count</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">span_count</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">report</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">report</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="p">{}</span></div>


<div class="viewcode-block" id="BuildResult.as_dict">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.build.BuildResult.as_dict">[docs]</a>
    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">as_dict</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">object</span><span class="p">]:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">{</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;output_path&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">output_path</span><span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;format&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">format</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;span_count&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">span_count</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;report&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">report</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">}</span></div>
</div>



<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_enforce_revision_build_provenance</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">require_complete</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Reject revise-profile builds with invalid or incomplete provenance.</span>

<span class="sd">    Runs before any output is written so transactional build safety is</span>
<span class="sd">    preserved (the last good output is untouched on failure).</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">is_revision_selection_profile</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="k">return</span>
    <span class="n">audit</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">audit_revision_provenance</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">audit</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">issues</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">preview</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;; &quot;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">join</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">issue</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">issue</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">code</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">issue</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">audit</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">issues</span><span class="p">[:</span><span class="mi">10</span><span class="p">]</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">audit</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">issues</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="mi">10</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">preview</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;; ...&quot;</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">BuildError</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;revision profile build rejected: active targets have invalid &quot;</span>
            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;judge-decision provenance (</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">preview</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">). Recreate each record via: &quot;</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;booktx judge record . --record RECORD_ID --format decisions&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">require_complete</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">source_record_ids</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span>
            <span class="n">rec</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">chunk</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">_load_chunks</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">rec</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">chunk</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records</span>
        <span class="p">}</span>
        <span class="n">missing</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">sorted</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source_record_ids</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="n">audit</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">valid_record_ids</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">missing</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">preview</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;, &quot;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">join</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">missing</span><span class="p">[:</span><span class="mi">10</span><span class="p">])</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">missing</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="mi">10</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">preview</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;, ...&quot;</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">BuildError</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;build --require-complete rejected: revision profile is not &quot;</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;complete; records missing an active target with matching &quot;</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;provenance: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">preview</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>


<div class="viewcode-block" id="build_project">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.build.build_project">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">build_project</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">require_complete</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">require_reviewed</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">BuildResult</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Build the translated output document for ``project``.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">_enforce_revision_build_provenance</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">require_complete</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">require_complete</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">source</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">find_source_file</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">format</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;markdown&quot;</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">source</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">suffix</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">lower</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;.md&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;.markdown&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">_build_markdown</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">project</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">require_complete</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">require_complete</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">require_reviewed</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">require_reviewed</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">format</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;epub&quot;</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">source</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">suffix</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">lower</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;.epub&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">_build_epub</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">project</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">require_complete</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">require_complete</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">require_reviewed</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">require_reviewed</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">BuildError</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Cannot build format </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">format</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2">; &quot;</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;booktx v1 supports only markdown and epub.&quot;</span>
    <span class="p">)</span></div>

</pre></div>
